MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY BITTNER, JENNIFER AS TO DEFENDANT PAKZAD, ARASH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-04-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BITTNER, JENNIFER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAKZAD, ARASH $200.00 PRINCIPAL, $61.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $261.50, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT DEFENDANT SHALL SHARE RESPONSIBILITY FOR THE CITATIONS AND LATE FEES TOTALING $800.00; THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DEFENDANT'S SHARE, REDUCED BY HIS PREVIOUS PAYMENT OF $200.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
